overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a desert highway on the outskirts of Night City. The player approaches and crosses a railroad crossing, with the futuristic city skyline visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway roadside with power lines

events.description: black SUV drives past on the highway
character steps off the asphalt shoulder onto the dirt roadside

agents.ego_description: walking along the desert highway roadside, moving toward the railroad crossing

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the highway in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall metal electricity pylons stretching along the highway
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
metal guardrail separating the dirt path from the asphalt road
dry grass and small bushes typical of desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with the Night City skyline visible in the far distance. The camera walks steadily along the dirt roadside beside a metal guardrail, with power transmission towers lining the right side. A black SUV passes by on the asphalt road as the character moves toward a distant railroad crossing.

events.description: approaching the railroad crossing infrastructure and control tower
pink sports car drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the railroad tracks, moving past the control tower building

notable_agents.action: pink sports car speeding along the highway

entered.detail: small two-story building with blue trim and external staircase
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking the road
metal train tracks crossing the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to the railroad crossing area where a small control tower stands on the left. The camera crosses the asphalt and the railroad tracks, passing red and white striped barriers. A pink sports car speeds past on the highway as the player character continues across the intersection.

events.description: crossing the railroad tracks into open desert terrain
turning slightly left to follow the desert path alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path on the desert side of the railroad tracks, passing abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: large metal structure with signal lights spanning the tracks
derelict car wreck sitting in the desert scrub
large cylindrical storage tank on concrete base beside the path

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the tracks, the camera moves through open desert terrain passing under the railroad signal gantry. An abandoned vehicle and a blue industrial tank appear on the left side of the path. The city skyline shifts to the right as the camera turns slightly to follow the desert trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approach with distant city view

events.description: large advertising blimp becomes visible floating over the city skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the desert path with the city skyline prominent ahead, observing the landscape

entered.detail: tall saguaro cacti scattered across the desert landscape
futuristic airship with digital billboard floating over Night City

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the open desert landscape with saguaro cacti on the left and the Night City skyline directly ahead. A futuristic advertising blimp floats over the city. The camera continues along the dirt path beside the highway guardrail, with the urban skyline growing larger in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway that gradually draws closer to the towering skyline of Night City. It begins with a steady walk along a dirt roadside beside a metal guardrail and power transmission towers, as a black SUV passes by on the asphalt. As the camera reaches a railroad crossing, it moves past a small control tower and red-and-white striped barriers while a pink sports car speeds past. The scene then opens into a wider desert expanse, passing under a signal gantry and by an abandoned vehicle and blue industrial tank before the camera turns slightly to follow a trail. Finally, the path leads through a landscape of saguaro cacti toward the urban horizon, where a futuristic advertising blimp floats over the city as the skyline grows larger in the distance.
